pageTitle: Have the other parties agreed to this application?
caption: Make an application
heading: Have the other parties agreed to this application?
question: Have the other parties agreed to this application?
hint: If you ask the court for more than one thing, this answer will apply to all of them.
theOtherPartyIsTheOtherSide: The ‘other party’ is the other side involved in your case. For example your landlord, housing association, or mortgage lender.
everyOtherPartyWillNeedToAgree: Every other party will need to agree to let you make this application, if they don’t agree you may need to pay a higher fee.
ifTheOtherPartiesDoNotAgree: If the other parties do not agree
feeWillIncreaseIf: Your application fee will increase to {{maxFee, currency(currency: GBP; trailingZeroDisplay: stripIfInteger)}}, if:
youHaveAlreadyToldTheOtherParty: you have already told the other party that you are making this application, and
theyDidNotAgreeToIt: they did not agree to it (this means that they have objected to it)
youWillSeeTheFinalApplicationFee: You’ll see the final application fee before you pay.
youWillNeedToUploadEvidence: You will need to upload evidence for the court, to show that:
youHaveToldTheOtherParties: you have told the other parties, and
forExampleACopyOfALetter: For example a copy of a letter, email, or a signed consent order. We will ask you to upload this evidence later in this application.
ifYouAreNotAbleToContactOtherParties: If you’re not able to contact the other parties, or you’ve attempted to contact them but have not responded, select ‘No’.

errors.confirmWhetherOtherPartiesHaveAgreed: Confirm whether the other parties have agreed to this application
